user_system_path: Between rungs — no active implementation seam. The owner names the next seam. Live product thread is the GUARDIAN (workday-presence): it fires, grounds a real commitment, and pings Slack only when it has a reviewable move (#391/#393/#394 live). Standing candidates: owner-side external 15-min cron for cadence; code-side, the brief seeding the matched draft at generation time; clean malformed commitment titles; legacy cyan favicons; triage stale branches + skipped tests. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has a boot prompt for the next session.
next_command: New session: read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md + FOLDERA_MASTER_BIBLE.md Part II-B + the heartbeat memory; the owner names the next seam (likely the external cron for guardian cadence, or the brief seeding the matched draft).
